title: American Electric Power Investors
note: Company investor page used for capital plan, load growth, transmission-network positioning, stock quote context, and filing references.

title: American Electric Power Operating Companies
note: Lists AEP operating companies, states served, customer counts, and distribution/transmission footprint context.

title: About AEP Ohio
note: Official AEP Ohio page identifying the Ohio utility business and its customer-service role.

title: About Appalachian Power
note: Official Appalachian Power page describing service across Tennessee, Virginia, and West Virginia as an AEP operating company.

title: American Electric Power Market Cap and P/E Ratio
note: Market-data source for AEP market capitalization, share price context, rank, and trailing P/E ratio during the May 2026 refresh.

title: OpenEMS
note: Open-source energy management project used as a plausible alternative layer for local energy, storage, charging, and microgrid coordination.

title: OpenEMS GitHub Repository
note: Public source repository supporting openness and implementation-readiness claims for OpenEMS.

title: OpenLEADR
note: Open-source OpenADR implementation source for demand-response and flexible-load coordination concepts.

title: OpenLEADR Documentation
note: Technical documentation for OpenADR client, server, reporting, and message-signing behavior used in demand-response alternative analysis.

title: Grid eXchange Fabric GitHub Organization
note: Public source organization for Grid eXchange Fabric, formerly Open Smart Grid Platform.

title: Grid eXchange Fabric Introduction
note: Documentation source for GXF grid-device communication and flexible-load management context.
